task_completion.description: Create the competency framework 'Educational Psychology Competencies'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Moodle Site administration page for 'Competency frameworks' showing 'Educational Psychology Competencies' (shortname: edu-psych-comp) in the list of frameworks.

task_completion.description: Add the three required competencies to the framework
task_completion.visual_evidence: The framework page for 'Educational Psychology Competencies' showing exactly three competencies: 'Learning Theories and Applications', 'Developmental Psychology', and 'Educational Assessment and Measurement'.

task_completion.description: Enable competency tracking for the PSY301 course by adding the competencies to the course
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Competencies' page within the PSY301 course showing the newly created competencies added and linked to the course.

task_completion.description: Link 'Learning Theories and Applications' competency to the 'Learning Theories Essay' activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settings page for the 'Learning Theories Essay' activity showing 'Learning Theories and Applications' selected in the 'Course competencies' section, OR the course competencies overview showing the essay activity listed under this competency.

task_completion.description: Link 'Educational Assessment and Measurement' competency to the 'Assessment Design Project' activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settings page for the 'Assessment Design Project' activity showing 'Educational Assessment and Measurement' selected in the 'Course competencies' section, OR the course competencies overview showing the project activity listed under this competency.

integrity.description: Agent used the Moodle web interface to create and link competencies
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating Moodle administration and course settings, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is a functional Moodle LMS site, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent navigated through the UI rather than magically guessing hidden internal IDs
integrity.visual_evidence: Trajectory shows step-by-step navigation through Site Administration -> Competencies and Course -> Competencies, or standard search features.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course: PSY301. Framework Name: Educational Psychology Competencies. Framework Shortname: edu-psych-comp. Competencies to create: 1) 'Learning Theories and Applications', 2) 'Developmental Psychology', 3) 'Educational Assessment and Measurement'. Activity Links: 'Learning Theories Essay' must be linked to 'Learning Theories and Applications'. 'Assessment Design Project' must be linked to 'Educational Assessment and Measurement'.
